name: GoGo for the Gold
overview: 12 Gogo boys from across the country descend on Hollywood to compete for 10 Thousand dollars and the title of 'America's #1 Champion Gogo Superstar... Star.' The contestants are judged by a panel of Gogo experts and compete in challenges to find out who stays and who go-goes home.

trailers.title: Gogo For The Gold: The Search For America's #1 Champion Gogo Superstar Star OFFICIAL TRAILER/OUTtv
